name: Pork Chorizo
recipeInstructions:
Note: This recipe requires advance preparation.
Combine all the ingredients except the pork in a blender and puree. Mix this mixture thoroughly into the pork until evenly distributed. Cover and refrigerate for 24 hours. At this point, chorizo may be frozen. To cook, crumble the chorizo in a skillet over medium heat and fry until browned. If desired, add eggs and/or potatoes. Drain excess fat before serving.
